name: international_security_vendor_patch_southport_tru_loy
premise: A International Security response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving international security vendor patch southport tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Kaito Mensah
agents.identity: I am Kaito Mensah, accountable for a defensible call in International Security when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Sana Santos
agents.identity: I am Sana Santos, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in International Security.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Kaito Mensah must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Kaito Mensah do?
